title: Shield camouflage
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Shield camouflage''' was a [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]]-masking technology developed at [[Hosrel XI]] by the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]] Navy. Though not as effective as a true [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]], it had its uses in areas of stellar disturbance like [[Nebula/Legends|nebulae]], where it blended a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] in with interstellar dust and gas. Unfortunately, the ship's regular defensive [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]] needed to be deactivated for the system to function properly.

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-07-24 -->{{GamerCite|5|A Campaign Guide to the Centrality}}
